summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that NVDA is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $178.26. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 100.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $191.25 and a significant trendline confluence around $188.70 (formed by 10 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
